lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Raag Gauree Poorbee, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਕਬਹੂ ਨ ਮਨਹੁ ਬਿਸਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: har har kabahoo na manahu bisaare |
lines.english: Never forget the Lord, Har, Har, from your mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਈਹਾ ਊਹਾ ਸਰਬ ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ਸਗਲ ਘਟਾ ਪ੍ਰਤਿਪਾਰੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: eehaa aoohaa sarab sukhadaataa sagal ghattaa pratipaare |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Here and hereafter, He is the Giver of all peace. He is the Cherisher of all hearts. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੀਤਲ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਸੂਖ ਹਰਿ ਸਰਣੀ ਜਲਤੀ ਅਗਨਿ ਨਿਵਾਰੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: seetal saant sookh har saranee jalatee agan nivaare |1|
lines.english: In the Lord's Sanctuary there is soothing coolness, peace and tranquility. He has extinguished the burning fire. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਾ ਕਸਟ ਕਾਟੈ ਖਿਨ ਭੀਤਰਿ ਰਸਨਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਚਿਤਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: mahaa kasatt kaattai khin bheetar rasanaa naam chitaare |
lines.english: He removes the most terrible pains in an instant, if the tongue repeats His Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਆਰਾਧਤ ਮਨ ਮਹਿ ਜਮ ਕੀ ਤ੍ਰਾਸ ਬਿਦਾਰੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: charan kamal aaraadhat man meh jam kee traas bidaare |2|
lines.english: Adoring His Lotus Feet in the mind, the fear of death is banished. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਰਭ ਕੁੰਡ ਨਰਕ ਤੇ ਰਾਖੈ ਭਵਜਲੁ ਪਾਰਿ ਉਤਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: garabh kundd narak te raakhai bhavajal paar utaare |
lines.english: He saves us from the hellish pit of the womb, and carries us across the terrifying world-ocean.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਨ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਪਰਮੇਸੁਰ ਊਚਾ ਅਗਮ ਅਪਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: pooran paarabraham paramesur aoochaa agam apaare |
lines.english: He is the Perfect, Supreme Lord God, the Transcendent Lord, lofty, unfathomable and infinite.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਤ ਧਿਆਵਤ ਸੁਖ ਸਾਗਰ ਜੂਏ ਜਨਮੁ ਨ ਹਾਰੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: gun gaavat dhiaavat sukh saagar jooe janam na haare |3|
lines.english: Singing His Glorious Praises, and meditating on the Ocean of peace, one's life is not lost in the gamble. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮਿ ਕ੍ਰੋਧਿ ਲੋਭਿ ਮੋਹਿ ਮਨੁ ਲੀਨੋ ਨਿਰਗੁਣ ਕੇ ਦਾਤਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: kaam krodh lobh mohi man leeno niragun ke daataare |
lines.english: My mind is engrossed in sexual desire, anger, greed and attachment, O Giver to the unworthy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਅਪੁਨੋ ਨਾਮੁ ਦੀਜੈ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਦ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੇ ॥੪॥੧॥੧੩੮॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa apuno naam deejai naanak sad balihaare |4|1|138|
lines.english: Please grant Your Grace, and bless me with Your Name; Nanak is forever a sacrifice to You. ||4||1||138||
Raag Gauree Chaytee, Fifth Mehl:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਤਿ ਜਨਮੁ ਇਹੁ ਰਤਨੁ ਅਮੋਲਕੁ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਤਿ ਜਪਿ ਇਕ ਖਿਨਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jeet janam ihu ratan amolak saadhasangat jap ik khinaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Be victorious, and win the priceless jewel of this human life, by meditating on Him in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, even for an instant. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਭਗਤਿ ਬਿਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: sukh naahee re har bhagat binaa |
lines.english: There is no peace without devotional worship of the Lord.
Horses, elephants and the pleasures of power
- leaving these behind, the fool must depart naked. ||2||
Many have renounced and left their children,
Wealth, spouses, joyful games and pleasures. ||1||
The body, scented with musk and sandalwood
- that body shall come to roll in the dust. ||3||
Infatuated with emotional attachment, they think that God is far away.
Says Nanak, he is Ever-present! ||4||1||139||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਧਰ ਤਰਬੇ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮ ਨੋ ॥
lines.translit: man dhar tarabe har naam no |
lines.english: O mind, cross over with the Support of the Lord's Name.
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਗਰ ਲਹਰਿ ਸੰਸਾ ਸੰਸਾਰੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਬੋਹਿਥੁ ਪਾਰ ਗਰਾਮਨੋ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: saagar lehar sansaa sansaar gur bohith paar garaamano |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Guru is the boat to carry you across the world-ocean, through the waves of cynicism and doubt. ||1||Pause||
The lamp of the Guru's spiritual wisdom illuminates and enlightens. ||1||
In this Dark Age of Kali Yuga, there is only pitch darkness.
Only the virtuous are saved, chanting and meditating on the Lord. ||2||
The poison of corruption is spread out far and wide.
Says Nanak, meditate on the One Lord;
Intoxicated with Maya, the people are asleep.
behold Him in each and every heart. ||4||2||140||
Meeting the Guru, doubt and fear are dispelled. ||3||
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:
I serve You with the Support of the Guru. ||1||Pause||
You alone are my Chief Advisor.
Taking hold of me, the Guru has made me Your slave. ||1||
I have conquered the five tyrants.
By various devices, I could not find You.
Now, I dwell in peace, poise and bliss. ||3||
By Guru's Grace, I have vanquished the army of evil. ||2||
I have received the One Name as His bounty and blessing.
